findings: The fixture is segmented for interactive replay with distinct visual anchors for ordinary life, role introduction, interface focus, rupture, pressure, threshold, and endings.
The visual plan includes stable visual refs, visible-character controls, branch modifiers, ending modifiers, hatch states, and a draft scene_set map.
The scene_set is sufficient for B-level draft replay planning, but a hand-built blockout remains required before high-consistency website art.
minor_revisions_applied_after_review: Neutralized the hatch-and-slate base prompt so hatch state is carried by modifiers.
Expanded the leverage-ending base prompt with Blackbox Aviary geometry.
